issues.detail: The instructions do not explicitly handle error scenarios such as missing API keys or script failures.
The instructions contain verbose sections that could be trimmed for brevity.
The skill assumes specific environment variables and paths tied to Claude, limiting cross-platform compatibility.

scenarios.name: Research what developers are saying about Bun runtime right now
scenarios.rationale: Treatment invokes the last30days.py script with --emit=compact, parses intent into TOPIC/TARGET_TOOL/QUERY_TYPE, supplements with WebSearch and weights Reddit/X/YouTube engagement signals over web, while baseline only suggests manual searches without engagement weighting or the script.

scenarios.name: Compare Plaud vs Granola for AI meeting notes based on community sentiment
scenarios.rationale: Treatment identifies QUERY_TYPE=COMPARISON, runs three research passes (A alone, B alone, A vs B), cites with @handles and r/subreddits, and reports mention counts with sentiment; baseline gives a generic features comparison without engagement-weighted, citation-rich synthesis.
